name: tunnel going outside
description: I'm in a tunnel going outside
hints: A tunnel with a sign and a button in the wall. The tunnel goes outside to a dome.
READ SIGN for information. PUSH BUTTON to see what it does. GO DOME exits to the field.
GO DOME takes you outside to a field (room 4) and sets flags 3 and 4. PUSH BUTTON may trigger effects. WEST returns to the dome (room 2).
GO DOME to exit to the field. The button may need to be pressed at the right time. WEST goes back to the starting dome.
notes: Tunnel from the starting dome going outside. Sign and button in wall. GO DOME exits to field (room 4) and sets flags 3+4 (likely triggers Hulk/Banner transformation). WEST returns to dome (room 2).
